title: Jubilee
content:

{{Quote|Leia, haul Chedaki out of there! I've got orders to ''jettison'' the shuttle!|Jubilee, to Princess Leia Organa|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
'''Jubilee''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served alongside [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Chedaki]] and [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Roak]] aboard their [[Chedaki's blockade runner|blockade runner]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. When Rebel [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] led an [[Mission to the Shiva system|investigation]] into the [[Shiva system/Legends|Shiva system]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], she and Chedaki were preparing a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Starship/Legends|craft]] that was attached to the blockade runner when the shuttle was hit by [[Anti-matter bomb|mines]].

Since the resulting [[Fire/Legends|fire]] threatened to give away the Rebels' position to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warship/Legends|warcraft]], Jubilee was tasked by Roak to fetch Chedaki and the Princess from the damaged craft and then jettison it from the mothership. When Jubilee realized that the jettison mechanism was dysfunctional, the Rebel panicked; despite the officer's frantic cries, Princess Organa instinctively shut herself in the shuttle and used its back-up trigger to detach it from the mothership, saving the lives of her crew.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Jubilee, get forward to the shuttle bay! Give Chedaki and the Princess a hand, and flash me a status report—on the double!|First Officer Roak gives orders|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
An [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Jubilee served aboard a [[Chedaki's blockade runner|blockade runner]] under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Chedaki]].<ref name="marvel53" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]] to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|176–177|Jubilee}}</ref> Jubilee crewed the [[Rebel ship of the line|vessel]] when it traveled to the remote [[Shiva system/Legends|Shiva system]] to [[Mission to the Shiva system|investigate]] an irregularly high level of Imperial activity in the region. Their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] carried Rebel leader [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who headed the investigation, and when she and Chedaki attempted to scan the inhabited [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Shiva IV]] using a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] that was attached to the blockade runner, the latter [[Pilot/Legends|flew]] into a [[Mine/Legends|minefield]] of [[anti-matter bomb]]s. Much of the damage struck the shuttle craft, [[Fire/Legends|igniting]] its [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] tanks, and both it and its mothership were quickly filled with smoke.<ref name="marvel53" />

[[File:Leia-Shuttle.png|thumb|left|300px|Princess Leia Organa in her doomed shuttle craft, which Jubilee had been sent to evacuate]]
Aboard the blockade runner, Jubilee was promptly ordered by [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Roak]] to go to the shuttle bay and help Organa and Chedaki escape the shuttle as well as to speedily give the officer a status report. The rest of the crew was then ordered to don [[Environment suit/Legends|pressure suits]] and to handle the fire aboard the mothership as it risked revealing their position to potential Imperial [[Warship/Legends|warcraft]] in the vicinity. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] Jubilee reached the shuttle, they had received Roak's order to jettison it<ref name="marvel53" /> safely from the blockade runner's main hold,<ref name="CSWE" /> where the subordinate relayed the order to Organa in person. Glancing at Jubilee in response, Organa informed the officer that Chedaki was dead and said that she was on her way out of the shuttle.<ref name="marvel53" />

However, Jubilee was then notified by Roak via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] that the firing circuits responsible for disconnecting the craft had been rendered inoperative. Becoming distraught, the junior crew member speculated that the explosion earlier had short-circuited the device. Organa ignored Jubilee's frantic cries and instinctively shut herself in the shuttle, using the back-up trigger within her craft to jettison it from the blockade runner. The Princess' decision to save the lives of her companions sent her falling toward Shiva IV with her shuttle craft ablaze,<ref name="marvel53" /> but she eventually returned to the Rebel Alliance safely.<ref name="marvel54">[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Hurry—''wait!'' Say again, Roak? By the stars, ''no!|Jubilee panics in response to news of the jettisoning mechanism's failure|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
Jubilee was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] with wavy, [[Color/Legends|brown]] hair. The Rebel exclaimed in shock when Roak pointed out via comlink that the jettisoning mechanism for the shuttle craft was inoperable. The crew member further cried in distress when Princess Organa locked herself in the shuttle craft and jettisoned it from the blockade runner.<ref name="marvel53" />

==Equipment==
{{Quote|Roak says the firing circuits are ''inoperative''. The explosion must have fused them!|Listening to Roak via comlink, Jubilee relays information to Princess Organa|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
The Rebel officer wore red [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], a [[Clothing/Legends|shirt]] with a red collar, and a [[headset comlink]], which was used to remotely communicate with Roak.<ref name="marvel53" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jubilee was created for the [[Star Wars (1977) 53|fifty-third issue]] of [[Marvel Comics|Marvel's]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]],<ref name="marvel53" /> which was written by [[Chris Claremont]], illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]] and [[Walter Simonson]], and published on [[August 18]], [[1981]].<ref name="TCC">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref>
